description: You are a Nurse Practitioner conducting an annual preventive health visit for patient Sherill Botsford (date of birth: January 24, 1995) in FreeMED (http://localhost/freemed/, login: admin / admin). Record the patient's vital signs: blood pressure 118/76 mmHg, heart rate 68 bpm, temperature 98.2°F, weight 145 lbs, and height 65 inches. Document the administration of a Tdap vaccine (date 2025-03-01, lot TDP2024-441, manufacturer Sanofi Pasteur) and an Influenza Quadrivalent vaccine (date 2025-10-15, lot FLQ2025-112, manufacturer Seqirus). Write a clinical note for this visit documenting the vaccines, a breast exam, and a cardiovascular assessment. Schedule the next annual physical for 2026-03-01 at 10:00 AM.
